body:
## Context

Parishioners want to contact each other — phone trees, carpooling, potlucks, checking in on someone. Currently this means asking around or scrolling WhatsApp contacts. A simple searchable directory solves this.

## What to do

### 1. Schema changes

Add to `families` table:
```sql
ALTER TABLE families ADD COLUMN directory_visible BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true;
```

Families can opt out. Default is visible.

### 2. RLS policy

```sql
CREATE POLICY "Members can read visible families"
  ON families FOR SELECT
  USING (
    directory_visible = true
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM profiles
      WHERE profiles.id = auth.uid()
      AND profiles.is_active = true
    )
  );
```

- Only logged-in active users can see the directory
- Only families with `directory_visible = true` appear
- Admins see everyone regardless (existing admin policy covers this)
- Members can still only *edit* their own family

### 3. Member directory page: `/member/directory`

**Search bar** — filters by family name or head of household name

**Family cards or table rows:**
- Family name
- Head of household name
- Phone number
- City/neighborhood (parsed from address, or just show full address)
- Member since year
- Family member count

**Click to expand (or card flip):**
- List of family members (from `family_members` table)
- Name + relationship badge (spouse, child, parent, etc.)

**No email shown** — phone only. Reduces spam/privacy risk.

**Empty state:** "No families found" with search suggestion

### 4. Privacy toggle on Family tab (#158)

Add to the Family tab in member portal:
- Toggle: "Show our family in the member directory"
- Maps to `families.directory_visible`
- Default: on
- Tooltip: "Other members can see your family name and phone number"

### 5. Add to member sidebar

New nav item in MemberSidebar (#155):
- Label: "Directory"
- Icon: address book / people icon
- Position: after Shares

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Directory page loads at `/member/directory`
- [ ] Only logged-in members can access (redirect to login if not authenticated)
- [ ] Search filters by family name and head of household
- [ ] Families with `directory_visible = false` do not appear
- [ ] Click expands to show family members
- [ ] Phone shown, email NOT shown
- [ ] Privacy toggle works on Family tab
- [ ] Admin can see all families in admin panel regardless of visibility

## Resource impact

- One boolean column on families table
- One RLS policy
- One new page, one query
- Zero external services, zero cost

## Dependencies

- #145 (families table)
- #146 (family_members table — for expanded view)
- #155 (member portal layout — sidebar nav)
- #158 (family tab — privacy toggle lives here)
title: Member directory: searchable family list for logged-in members
